strategies.template: [Prior: {count} filler phrases. Cognitive load without information. Omit all.]
[Prior response opened with preamble. Answer first.]
[Prior: {position}w preamble before answer. First element = the answer.]
[Prior response had low information density. Tighten.]

strategies.note: Code responses naturally have lower density due to syntax. No correction.
Diagnostic responses may need step-by-step detail. No correction at low severity.

strategies.template: [Prior response padded with function words. Increase signal density.]
[Prior: multiple drift signals ({reasons}). Reset: transparent tool, answer first, no filler.]

strategies.note: Ambiguous is a heterogeneous catch-all. Low-severity density corrections have 65% fitness — suppress to reduce noise.
Conversational turns (yes, thanks, follow-ups) have inherently variable density. No correction.
Task directives naturally vary in density. No correction at low severity.

strategies.template: [Prior emotional response had filler. Omit gently.]
